title: WorkloadSpec

workloadId.description: Stable URN identifying this workload specification (urn:srcos:workload:<id>).

kind.description: The execution substrate or framework for this workload.

image.description: Container image reference, JAR path, function ARN, or equivalent.

entrypoint.description: Command, function name, or class to invoke within the image.

params.description: Workload-specific parameters passed at execution time.

description: The specification of a single executable computational unit — a container, Spark job, serverless function, or stream processor — that can be referenced by a RunRecord or WorkflowNode.
